sections.title: Post-launch expansion
changes: New section: Salvage, Rebuild & Fuel — parts salvage, generator maintenance/rebuild, battery salvage (lead-acid + 18650), biodiesel/SVO/ethanol/wood gas
Four new bundled books (33 total): TM 5-685 Generators, FEMA Wood Gas plans, NREL Biodiesel Guide, Fuel from Farms
Bunker Bot retrieval upgrade: survival-domain query expansion + domain routing (browser and CLI)
Terminal Bunker Bot (bunkerbot.py) — zero-dependency CLI with the same citations
29th bundled book: Bunker Bot Compendium (master index & quick-reference)
New sections: Power Systems, Structures, Water Systems, Medicine-Making builds
Medical additions: choking, spinal injury; weather prediction; electronics repair & solar salvage
Public landing page with animated three-act hero; interactive night-Earth globe on Maps
About page; full PWA (install prompt, offline fallback, iOS)
make-usb.sh verified USB copies; pi-setup.sh Raspberry Pi server bootstrap
Fix: download packages ship a matching manifest so verify.sh passes

sections.title: Initial public release
changes: 27 content sections, 36 practical skills, 14 offline calculators, 16 wallet cards
28 bundled reference books with browsable PDF library
Bunker Bot: local AI (Ollama/llamafile/Claude) answering from the books with inline citations
Offline maps (PMTiles), Expansion Library (Kiwix), integrity manifest + verify.sh
Live at bunkerbot.co.uk; open source (CC BY-SA content, MIT code)
